Promoted to high for static beach facts only.

sourceNotes: Santorini 2026 amenities/access audit: Low-confidence Santorini audit: name/source not clearly verified; kept conservative with no facilities and moderate road access. Phase 2 OSM grouped source pass 2026-05-27: OSM source is a same-name Paralia Kerkezou natural=beach feature near the current Santorini Kerkezou coordinates. Source supports identity/location only for this pass; confidence, access, services, amenities, and recommendation logic remain unchanged pending stricter local review.

Santorini strict evidence pass 2026-05-29: promoted from low to medium. OSM supports a same-name natural=beach feature near the current coordinates, and Vista Yachting names Kerkezou Akrotiri Beach near the Akrotiri lighthouse with isolated character and a short challenging hike from parking/taxi drop-off. Evidence is still not strong enough for high because it lacks robust independent terrain/service detail for the exact beach card.

sourceNotes: Phase 2 Santorini low cleanup 2026-05-28: Santorini View supports Katharos near Oia, black pebbles and volcanic rocks, no sunbeds/umbrellas on the shore, access by steep/narrow path from a small parking area, and a nearby meze bar above/off the beach. No live condition claim was encoded.

Santorini strict evidence pass 2026-05-29: Santorini View and Santorini More support Katharos near Oia, black pebbles/coarse volcanic sand and rocks, no shore sunbeds/umbrellas, small parking above, short winding/steep path access, and nearby off-beach meze bar. Promoted to high for static beach facts only.
